tools.name: getHealth
tools.title: Health Check
tools.description: Returns the operational status of the NeNe Concierge API. Use this as a first call to verify the server is reachable.

tools.name: listOrganizations
tools.title: List Organizations
tools.description: Returns all organizations accessible to the authenticated operator. Use this to find organization IDs before working with scenarios.

tools.name: getOrganizationById
tools.title: Get Organization
tools.description: Returns a single organization by its integer ID.

tools.name: listScenarios
tools.title: List Scenarios
tools.description: Returns all scenarios (draft and published) for the authenticated operator's organization. Use this to find scenario IDs.

tools.name: getScenarioById
tools.title: Get Scenario
tools.description: Returns a single scenario with its full node and edge graph. Use this to read the current scenario structure before making edits.

tools.name: getScenarioAnalytics
tools.title: Get Scenario Analytics
tools.description: Returns aggregated analytics for a scenario: total sessions, completion rate, per-node visit counts, average dwell times, drop-off rates, branch percentages, and bottleneck nodes (drop-off rate ≥ 0.5). Preview sessions are excluded. Use period=7d for the last 7 days.

period.description: Analysis period: 1d, 7d, 30d, 90d, or custom. Defaults to 7d.

tools.name: listActionCredentials
tools.title: List Action Credentials
tools.description: Returns all action credentials for the organization. The config (secrets) field is omitted from list responses.

tools.name: createOrganization
tools.title: Create Organization
tools.description: Creates a new organization with a unique slug. The slug is used for subdomain-based org resolution. Use plan=free for new organizations.

slug.description: URL-safe slug (lowercase alphanumeric and hyphens, e.g. 'my-company').

plan.description: Subscription plan: free, starter, pro, or enterprise. Defaults to free.

tools.name: updateOrganization
tools.title: Update Organization
tools.description: Partially updates an organization. Only the fields you provide are changed. Use this to rename, change plan, or toggle active state.

tools.name: createScenario
tools.title: Create Scenario
tools.description: Creates a new chat scenario in draft status. You can provide an initial set of nodes and edges, or add them later with updateScenario. Node types: message (shows text to visitor), condition (auto-routes based on variables), action (triggers email/Slack/HTTP), end (terminates the session).

nodes.description: Initial nodes. Each node needs node_id (UUID), type (message/condition/action/end), label.

edges.description: Initial edges. Each edge needs source_node_id and target_node_id. Optional label for branch names.

tools.name: updateScenario
tools.title: Update Scenario
tools.description: Partially updates a scenario. Passing nodes or edges REPLACES the entire set (not a merge). Use status=published to make a scenario live, status=draft to revert. Always fetch the current scenario first with getScenarioById before making edits.

tools.name: startPreviewSession
tools.title: Start Preview Session
tools.description: Starts a preview session for any scenario (draft or published). Preview sessions are excluded from analytics and never trigger action adapters. Use this to test a scenario before publishing.

tools.name: stepPreviewSession
tools.title: Step Preview Session
tools.description: Advances a preview session to the next node. Pass target_node_id for message nodes. For condition nodes, target_node_id may be omitted (auto-routed by engine). Optionally pass answer to simulate variable collection.

target_node_id.description: Next node ID (required for message nodes, optional for condition nodes).

answer.description: Visitor answer to collect as a variable.

tools.name: createActionCredential
tools.title: Create Action Credential
tools.description: Creates a new action credential for use in action nodes. The config object holds adapter-specific secrets (webhook URLs, API tokens). Adapter types: http, email, slack, chatwork.

adapter.description: Adapter type: http, email, slack, or chatwork.

tools.name: updateActionCredential
tools.title: Update Action Credential
tools.description: Partially updates an action credential. Only provided fields are changed.

tools.name: deleteScenario
tools.title: Delete Scenario
tools.description: Permanently deletes a scenario, its nodes, and edges. This cannot be undone. Always confirm the scenario ID before calling.

tools.name: deleteActionCredential
tools.title: Delete Action Credential
tools.description: Permanently deletes an action credential. Any scenario action nodes referencing this credential will fail at runtime. Confirm the credential ID before calling.

tools.name: deleteOrganization
tools.title: Delete Organization
tools.description: Permanently deletes an organization and all associated data. This cannot be undone. Use with extreme caution.
